rationale: The citing paper mentions Moe (2006) only in a grouped literature citation as an example of recent two-stage, attribute-screening choice models. It does not engage with Moe's specific framework, results, or empirical setting, and it does not trace any core modeling component directly to that paper. The paper instead singles out other work as most closely related when defining its own contribution. This indicates a background-positioning citation rather than a distinct substantive dependency.
